response.overview: Antappan is a man with an extraordinary belief: he is convinced that he is Jesus Christ, returned to Earth with a mission that only he fully understands. His family, neighbors, and the wider community see his words and behavior as signs of mental illness, but Antappan refuses to accept their judgment. To him, every rejection is a test of faith, and every person in pain is someone he has been sent to help.
response.title: Antappante Athbudha Pravarthikal
